methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Growth → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.2x) to $690M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Robotics & Manufacturing (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 11 same-sector peers exist in Robotics & Manufacturing, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
Bethlehem Steel Corp is a Growth-stage robotics and manufacturing company that has raised $690M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a broader Robotics & Manufacturing peer universe of nine private companies and one public comparable (277810.KQ), including references to 1X Technologies, Divergent, Exotec, Locus Robotics, and Bedrock Robotics.

The Stage-Progression method is the applicable triangulation approach here. Using total capital raised ($690M) as a valuation proxy and applying a 1.2x step-up multiplier typical of Growth-stage progression, the analysis implies a valuation of $828M. This method reflects the expected value expansion between current stage and the subsequent financing round. The Peer-Median approach could not be reliably applied due to insufficient same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables; while 11 same-sector peers exist, filtering by stage and valuation tier yielded fewer than three datapoints, making median multiples unreliable without risking circularity.

The triangulated valuation range is $704M to $952M, with a median estimate of $828M. This range reflects a ±15% sensitivity band around the stage-progression output. Key uncertainties include the absence of tightly comparable peers at Growth stage in this sector, which limits confidence in the step-up multiplier applied, and the reliance on raised capital as a valuation proxy rather than market-based operating metrics. Additional data on revenue, unit economics, or comparable exit multiples would sharpen conviction in this range.
